name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients quarterly tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients quarterly, inefficient tax summary extraction causes delays in client reporting. We automate the extraction and formatting instead of manual compilation of tax summaries.
problem_solved: Inefficient tax withholding summary extraction and formatting
